labels.ozzy atlantic city: ozzy killed someone in an atlantic city casino.
labels.meridian_pull: a paragraph pulled from somewhere else.
labels.meridian_1982: born 1982, long beach. legal name daniel mercer.
labels.meridian_alley: bottle caps and rain-warped receipts under the bed.
labels.meridian_maps: fourth-grade maps of dead malls and frozen harbors.
labels.meridian_class: 1992 classroom. the last bright room before the tunnel.
labels.meridian_hoodies: oversized hoodies under black leather jackets.
labels.meridian_docks: loading docks at 2 a.m. industrial long beach.
labels.meridian_photos: discarded one-hour photo prints from pharmacy trash.
labels.meridian_north_talk: shackleton photocopies in notebooks. never north of oregon.
labels.meridian_warehouse: 1998. pills in a taco bell napkin behind a carpet warehouse.
labels.meridian_geography_drugs: ketamine with motel bathrooms. blocks as pill neighborhoods.
labels.meridian_lists: 2001 overdose scare. lists of everyone who vanished.
labels.meridian_signal_static: signal static record shop. shelved by mood. fired after eleven days.
labels.meridian_iceland_bag: grocery bag of icelandic dock photos. eleven days missing.
labels.meridian_philly_sick: philadelphia mold work. cough that would not leave.
labels.meridian_postcards: postcards never sent. addresses crossed out twice.
labels.meridian_memory_split: kind in one room. cruel in the next.
labels.meridian_online: forum posts after death. username still active.
labels.fence man: something moved behind the fence at 2:37.
